THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KEARNEY, FREDERICK T. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERGUSON, LAYLA A. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $47.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,047.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
